subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God at the hour when the breezes of separation blow upon all who dwell in the heavens and on earth, verily He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله فی حین الذی تهب نسایم الفراق علی کل من فی السموات و الارضین و انه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
